notes:
The game doesn't start at all right out-of-the box. By nuking the default wineprefix[0] and reinstalling .NET and XNA[1], you can get the game running, however, without any sound. For sound you need to install WMP9, which works only in 32-bit wine prefixes (the default Proton's one is 64-bit). Unfortunately, Proton doesn't like 32-bit prefixes, so the game won't start after switching to 32-bit one (see https://github.com/ValveSoftware/Proton/issues/449).

[0] WINEPREFIX="/home/$USER/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/264540/pfx" winetricks annihilate
[1] WINEPREFIX="/home/$USER/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/264540/pfx" winetricks dotnet40 xna40
title: Platformines
